title: Character Attributes
subtitle: Total points {{total}} · Each 0-100 · Drag sliders to adjust
errorTotal: Attribute total is {{sum}}, must be exactly {{required}}
strength.0.label: Feeble
strength.0.text: Can barely push a heavy door open; utterly useless in physical tasks
strength.1.label: Weak
strength.1.text: Gets by in daily life, but struggles with heavy lifting
strength.2.label: Average
strength.2.text: Normal adult physique, handles most physical demands
strength.3.label: Strong
strength.3.text: Noticeably more powerful than most; has the edge in hand-to-hand combat
strength.4.label: Herculean
strength.4.text: Terrifying strength — can bend iron bars bare-handed
constitution.0.label: Sickly
constitution.0.text: Extremely frail; even a short jog leaves you gasping and prone to illness
constitution.1.label: Frail
constitution.1.text: Low stamina; needs frequent rest after sustained activity
constitution.2.label: Healthy
constitution.2.text: Normal constitution; handles ordinary fatigue and pain
constitution.3.label: Robust
constitution.3.text: Full of energy; can fight on for hours without showing fatigue, with strong recovery
constitution.4.label: Iron Body
constitution.4.text: Near-superhuman endurance; shrugs off pain that would break most people
agility.0.label: Clumsy
agility.0.text: Slow and uncoordinated; constantly tripping over your own feet
agility.1.label: Sluggish
agility.1.text: A beat slower than average; fumbles with delicate tasks
agility.2.label: Nimble
agility.2.text: Normal dexterity; handles basic climbing and dodging
agility.3.label: Agile
agility.3.text: Quick and fluid movements; skilled at stealth and fast reactions
agility.4.label: Phantom
agility.4.text: Moves like a shadow — others can barely track your movements
intelligence.0.label: Dull
intelligence.0.text: Slow thinking; struggles to grasp complex cause and effect
intelligence.1.label: Slow
intelligence.1.text: Handles simple problems, but falters with complex reasoning
intelligence.2.label: Clever
intelligence.2.text: Normal comprehension and analytical ability; can devise sound plans
intelligence.3.label: Brilliant
intelligence.3.text: Sharp mind; adept at finding flaws and hidden connections
intelligence.4.label: Genius
intelligence.4.text: Astonishing intellect — can see through the most elaborate schemes in an instant
perception.0.label: Oblivious
perception.0.text: Almost unaware of your surroundings; frequently misses obvious clues
perception.1.label: Careless
perception.1.text: Notices the obvious, but easily overlooks details
perception.2.label: Alert
perception.2.text: Normal observation; picks up on most anomalies
perception.3.label: Keen
perception.3.text: Eagle-eyed; catches micro-expressions and the faintest traces in the environment
perception.4.label: Prescient
perception.4.text: Nearly impossible to hide anything from you; intuition borders on the supernatural
willpower.0.label: Spineless
willpower.0.text: Gives in under the slightest pressure; instinctively submits to threats
willpower.1.label: Wavering
willpower.1.text: Has some principles, but easily compromises under duress
willpower.2.label: Steadfast
willpower.2.text: Normal willpower; holds firm under ordinary pressure
willpower.3.label: Resolute
willpower.3.text: Unmoved by intimidation or temptation; exceptionally mentally resilient
willpower.4.label: Indomitable
willpower.4.text: Iron will — neither torture nor psychic assault can break you
charisma.0.label: Awkward
charisma.0.text: Tongue-tied; social situations always end in embarrassment
charisma.1.label: Bland
charisma.1.text: Communicates adequately, but rarely leaves a lasting impression
charisma.2.label: Personable
charisma.2.text: Speaks appropriately; navigates social settings with ease
charisma.3.label: Charming
charisma.3.text: Natural persuasiveness; easily wins trust and goodwill
charisma.4.label: Mesmerizing
charisma.4.text: Irresistible personal magnetism — a few words can turn the tide
luck.0.label: Cursed
luck.0.text: Bad luck seems to be your gift; mishaps always go the worst possible way
luck.1.label: Unlucky
luck.1.text: Luck runs cold; tends to fall apart at critical moments
luck.2.label: Ordinary
luck.2.text: Average luck — sometimes good, sometimes bad, nothing remarkable
luck.3.label: Lucky
luck.3.text: Tends to land on your feet at critical moments; coincidences often favor you
luck.4.label: Blessed
luck.4.text: As if kissed by Lady Fortune — incredible good luck keeps finding you
